name: Student Package — 5D4N Ijen + Papuma + Tumpak Sewu + Bromo
description: ISIC student rate for 5-day extended East Java circuit: Ijen Blue Fire, Papuma Beach with extra day, Tumpak Sewu waterfall, and Bromo sunrise. Same safety standards: HPWKI-registered guides, mandatory health screening (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). ISIC Provider ID 259268. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.
touristType: International students with verified ISIC card

item.name: Day 1 — Surabaya to Bondowoso + Ijen Screening
item.description: Private transfer from Surabaya to Bondowoso. Health screening on arrival (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). Dinner and overnight.

item.name: Day 2 — Ijen Blue Fire + Transfer to Papuma
item.description: Midnight departure to Paltuding base. Guided ascent to Kawah Ijen (2,386 m). Blue Fire observation. Gas masks and trekking poles provided. Descent, breakfast, transfer south to Papuma Beach area.

item.name: Day 3 — Papuma Beach + Tumpak Sewu Waterfall
item.description: Morning at Papuma Beach. Transfer to Tumpak Sewu waterfall (~120 m curtain waterfall). Optional canyon descent. Overnight in Lumajang area.

item.name: Day 4 — Transfer to Bromo + Bromo Stargazing
item.description: Transfer to Bromo area. Free time or optional local exploration. Overnight at Bromo-area hotel.

item.name: Day 5 — Bromo Sunrise + Return to Surabaya
item.description: Penanjakan viewpoint for Bromo sunrise over the Tengger caldera. Private 4WD jeep to crater base. Return to Surabaya for drop-off.

offers.description: ISIC student pricing per person: IDR 4,050,000 (2 pax) · IDR 3,850,000 (3) · IDR 3,650,000 (4–5) · IDR 3,450,000 (6–7) · IDR 3,250,000 (8–10) · IDR 3,050,000 (11+). Minimum 2 guests. All-inclusive: private transport, 4 nights accommodation + breakfast, entrance fees, Bromo jeep, Ijen gas masks, health screening, water, T-shirt.
